TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dave_Batton, title = Dave_Batton, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dave_Batton} }

S.FORM: Dave Batton sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1956, byacing te 3 ru 26 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Maryland, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 208 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 109 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1978 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Jersey Nets. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Dave Batton sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1956, byacing te 3 ru 26 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Maryland, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 208 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 109 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1978 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Jersey Nets. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *a*e βatton s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa marjlan*, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu new *ers~ɕej nets~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
